name: Taric

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Bravado
passive.description_source: Innate: After casting an ability,  Taric empowers his next two basic attacks to gain tremendous  total attack speed, deal bonus magic damage based on his bonus armor, and  reduce the cooldowns of his basic abilities.

effects.description:
Innate: After casting an ability, Taric empowers his next two basic attacks within 5 seconds to each gain 100% total attack speed, deal 25 : 101 (based on level) (+ 15% bonus armor) bonus magic damage on-attack, and reduce the remaining cooldowns of his basic abilities by 1 : 2 (based on ability haste)
seconds.

passive.description:
Innate: After casting an ability, Taric empowers his next two basic attacks within 5 seconds to each gain 100% total attack speed, deal 25 : 101 (based on level) (+ 15% bonus armor) bonus magic damage on-attack, and reduce the remaining cooldowns of his basic abilities by 1 : 2 (based on ability haste)
seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The first attack refreshes Bravado's duration.

basic_ability_1.name: Starlight's Touch
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Taric  heals himself and nearby allied champions based on his maximum health per charge of Starlight's Touch that he periodically stocks, up to a cap.  Bravado-empowered attacks each grant one charge.

effects.context_notes: Active: Taric heals himself and nearby allied champions for 25 (+ 15% AP) (+ 1% of his maximum health) per charge of Starlight's Touch that he periodically stocks, up to a maximum amount.

effects.description: Starlight's Touch can heal up to a maximum of 125 (+ 75% AP) (+ 5% of Taric's maximum health) at 5 charges.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Taric heals himself and nearby allied champions for 25 (+ 15% AP) (+ 1% of his maximum health) per charge of Starlight's Touch that he periodically stocks, up to a maximum amount. Bravado's empowered attacks each grant one charge.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The healing will apply heal effects (such as Summon Aery) prioritizing targets in Taric's circle, based on proximity to him, then in the Bastioned ally's circle, based on proximity to that ally (including it).

basic_ability_2.name: Bastion
basic_ability_2.description_source: Passive:  Taric gains  bonus armor and forms a  tether to the ally bound by Bastion. While the tether persists, the ally gains the bonus armor and Taric's abilities are mimicked to them.

effects.context_notes: Passive: Taric gains bonus armor and forms a tether between him and the ally bound by Bastion.
Active: Taric grants himself and the target allied champion a shield for 2.5 seconds, binding them with Bastion.

effects.description: Taric can also self-cast to shield himself; if he self-casts and is untethered, he will become tethered to the nearest ally. Similarly, if he is tethered to an ally and self-casts, both he and the ally will be shielded. Only one ally can be bound at a time, and selecting a new ally overrides the previous bind.

basic_ability_2.description: Passive: Taric gains bonus armor and forms a tether between him and the ally bound by Bastion. While the tether persists, the ally also gains the bonus armor and Taric's abilities are mimicked to them, though the effects do not stack.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The mimicked abilities will still complete even if Taric dies or leaves range.

basic_ability_3.name: Dazzle
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Taric winds up over a brief moment, then projects a beam of starlight in the target direction that briefly  stuns enemies hit, dealing magic damage based on his bonus armor.

effects.context_notes: Active: Taric winds up over 1 second, granting ghosting to nearby units, then projects a beam of starlight in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and stuns them for 1.5 seconds.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Taric winds up over 1 second, granting ghosting to nearby units, then projects a beam of starlight in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and stuns them for 1.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Dazzle will aim towards the target direction on-cast when firing from both his and his Bastion's positions.

ultimate.name: Cosmic Radiance
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Taric calls down a star that descends to him over a short time. Afterwards, he and nearby allied champions become  invulnerable for a short time.

effects.description: Active: Taric calls down a star from above that descends to him over 2.5 seconds. Afterwards, he and nearby allied champions become invulnerable for 2.5 seconds.

ultimate.description: Active: Taric calls down a star from above that descends to him over 2.5 seconds. Afterwards, he and nearby allied champions become invulnerable for 2.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Cosmic Radiance has no effect on untargetable allies.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
